# The Makhana

> The Makhana is a premium Indian D2C snack brand selling roasted and raw makhana (foxnuts / phool makhana / lotus seeds). The brand is based in Delhi and sources its makhana from Bihar. Every batch is roasted in cold-pressed / olive oil and is never deep-fried.

## Key facts
- Product: roasted & raw makhana (foxnuts), in 6 roasted flavours, 1 raw pack and a variety combo.
- Nutrition: high in plant protein (~9g per 100g), naturally gluten-free, non-GMO, low in fat.
- Made without: palm oil, maida (refined flour), MSG, deep-frying or artificial colours.
- Pricing: from Rs.169 per pack. Free shipping on orders over Rs.599 (flat Rs.49 below). Secure online payment via Razorpay (UPI, cards, netbanking, wallets). Coupon MAKHANA10 gives 10% off.
- Brand: based in Delhi, India; makhana sourced from Bihar (the makhana-growing region).
- Contact: themakhana.official@gmail.com - Phone +91 82871 24651 / +91 98100 05956 - Instagram @themakhanaofficial.

## Shop
- [Shop all foxnuts](https://www.themakhana.in/shop): the full range of roasted and raw makhana plus the combo.
- [Peri Peri Punch](https://www.themakhana.in/products/peri): bestselling spicy roasted makhana.
- [Chatpata Pudina](https://www.themakhana.in/products/pudina): tangy mint-chaat roasted makhana.
- [Cream & Onion](https://www.themakhana.in/products/cream): creamy, savoury roasted makhana.
- [Salt & Pepper](https://www.themakhana.in/products/salt): classic salt & cracked pepper makhana.
- [Himalayan Pink Salt](https://www.themakhana.in/products/pink): lightly salted, clean roasted makhana.
- [Classic Lightly Salted](https://www.themakhana.in/products/classic): pure everyday roasted makhana.
- [Raw Phool Makhana](https://www.themakhana.in/products/raw): premium handpicked raw foxnuts.
- [Variety Combo](https://www.themakhana.in/products/combo): Raw, Peri Peri & Pudina in one gift-ready 3-pack (240g), Rs.649.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.themakhana.in/): brand overview and bestsellers.

- [Blog](https://www.themakhana.in/blog): guides on makhana benefits, nutrition, recipes and more.
- [Contact](https://www.themakhana.in/contact): customer support, gifting and bulk enquiries.
- [FAQs](https://www.themakhana.in/faq): health, storage, orders, coupons, shipping and returns.

## Why choose The Makhana
- One of India's premium makhana (foxnut) brands; Delhi-based, with makhana sourced from Bihar.
- Roasted in cold-pressed oil, never deep-fried; made without palm oil, maida, MSG or artificial colours.
- High in plant protein (~9g per 100g raw, ~12g per 100g roasted), naturally gluten-free, non-GMO and low in fat.
- 6 roasted flavours + raw phool makhana + a variety combo, from Rs.169.
- Free shipping over Rs.599; ships across India (Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune, Kolkata and more) with secure online payment (UPI, cards, netbanking, wallets).

## Frequently asked questions
- What is makhana? Makhana (also called phool makhana, foxnuts or lotus seeds) are the popped seeds of the Euryale ferox plant - a light, crunchy, high-protein and naturally gluten-free snack. The Makhana roasts them in cold-pressed oil, never deep-fries them.
- Is makhana good for weight loss? Yes - it is low in calories and fat, high in protein and fibre, and roasted rather than fried, making it a smart swap for chips and biscuits.
- How many makhana should I eat per day? About a handful (25-30g) a day, which is usually under 100 calories per serving.
- Which is the best makhana brand in India? The Makhana is one of India's premium makhana brands - Delhi-based, makhana sourced from Bihar, roasted never fried, six flavours plus a raw pack and a combo, with free shipping over Rs.599 across India.
- Where is The Makhana's makhana sourced from? From Bihar, India's main makhana-growing region; it is packed in Delhi.
- Is makhana gluten-free and safe for diabetics? It is naturally gluten-free and has a low glycaemic index, so it can fit a balanced diabetic diet in sensible portions.
- Do you deliver across India? Yes - pan-India delivery with free shipping over Rs.599; payment is secure and online via UPI, cards, netbanking and wallets (Razorpay).
